testcase.name: test_old_token_invalidated_after_password_change_admin_note

failure.message: AssertionError: OLD manager token should 401 after PW change, got 200 assert 200 == 401 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: test_password_change_otp_iter308.py:327: in test_old_token_invalidated_after_password_change_admin_note assert me2.status_code == 401, f"OLD manager token should 401 after PW change, got {me2.status_code}" E AssertionError: OLD manager token should 401 after PW change, got 200 E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
